Private Sub DescribeItem(itemObj As Object) As String
	If itemObj Is Map = False Then Return "<empty>"
	Dim item As Map = itemObj
	If item.IsInitialized = False Then Return "<empty>"
	Dim parts As List
	parts.Initialize
	parts.Add("type=" & item.GetDefault("type", ""))
	If item.GetDefault("id", "") <> "" Then parts.Add("id=" & item.GetDefault("id", ""))
	If item.GetDefault("title", "") <> "" Then parts.Add("title=" & item.GetDefault("title", ""))
	If item.GetDefault("stream", "") <> "" Then parts.Add("stream=" & item.GetDefault("stream", ""))
	If item.GetDefault("set", "") <> "" Then parts.Add("set=" & item.GetDefault("set", ""))
	If item.GetDefault("code", "") <> "" Then parts.Add("code=" & item.GetDefault("code", ""))
	Return JoinList(parts, ", ")
End Sub
